name: gantt
description: Gantt chart ÔÇö task bars across a date axis.
purpose: Use for project plans with overlapping or staggered tasks. Each task is a bar on the time axis; bars can span multiple periods and carry status tints.

tasks.description: Outer li per workstream lane; nested bullets per task. Each task carries inline-code tokens for span (`Q1 Ôćĺ Q2`) and optional status (`done` / `live` / `at-risk` / `blocked`).

skeleton:
<!-- _class: gantt -->

`2026 Q1 Ôćĺ 2026 Q4`

## What ships in each phase, by workstream.

Three workstreams across four quarters. Status pills tint each bar.

- Platform
  - Codebook signing `Q1 Ôćĺ Q2` `done`
  - Multi-tenant DEKs `Q2 Ôćĺ Q3` `live`
  - Per-purpose codebooks `Q3 Ôćĺ Q4` `at-risk`
- Operations
  - Manual rotation `Q1 Ôćĺ Q2` `done`
  - Automated rotation `Q2 Ôćĺ Q3` `live`
  - Crypto-shred `Q3 Ôćĺ Q4`
- Compliance
  - Audit trail `Q1 Ôćĺ Q2` `done`
  - Centralised log `Q2 Ôćĺ Q3`
  - Examiner pack `Q3 Ôćĺ Q4`
sample:
<!-- _class: gantt -->

`2026 Q1 Ôćĺ 2026 Q4`

## What ships in each phase, by workstream.

Three workstreams across four quarters; the one at-risk bar gates the full rollout.

- Framework
  - Signal taxonomy `Q1 Ôćĺ Q2` `done`
  - Scoring model v2 `Q2 Ôćĺ Q3` `live`
  - Per-team weighting `Q3 Ôćĺ Q4` `at-risk`
- Adoption
  - Pilot onboarding `Q1 Ôćĺ Q2` `done`
  - Weekly signal review `Q2 Ôćĺ Q3` `live`
  - Org-wide rollout `Q3 Ôćĺ Q4`
- Governance
  - Decision log `Q1 Ôćĺ Q2` `done`
  - Calibration cadence `Q2 Ôćĺ Q3`
  - Board reporting `Q3 Ôćĺ Q4`

whenToUse.title: Overlapping work across lanes
whenToUse.body: When tasks run in parallel across multiple workstreams and the audience needs to see who is busy when. The lane-stacked bars make concurrency visible at a glance.

whenToUse.title: Span is the story
whenToUse.body: Each bar's length encodes its duration. Use gantt when start dates, end dates, and overlap are what you want the audience to remember.

whenToUse.title: Status pills add a second channel
whenToUse.body: Tint bars with `done` / `live` / `at-risk` / `blocked` to layer health onto schedule. The plan reads as both 'when' and 'how it's going' in one chart.

antiPatterns.title: Single workstream
antiPatterns.body: One lane of bars is a timeline, not a gantt. Use `timeline` or `list-steps` when there is no parallel work to coordinate.

antiPatterns.title: More than five lanes
antiPatterns.body: Past five workstreams the bars compress and the labels crowd. Group lanes (collapse 'SDK' subdomains into 'SDK') or split into two slides.

antiPatterns.title: No spans
antiPatterns.body: If tasks are point-in-time milestones rather than durations, use `timeline` or `roadmap milestones`. gantt earns its chrome only when bars have meaningful length.

related.name: roadmap
related.when: phased grid of deliverables across workstreams without continuous spans

related.name: kanban
related.when: current state by stage rather than schedule by lane

related.name: list-steps
related.when: sequential process with descriptive steps, no parallel lanes

stressSample:

`2026 Q1 Ôćĺ 2026 Q4`

## Stress test ÔÇö four workstreams, twelve tasks, mixed status.

- Platform Engineering
  - Codebook signing service `Q1 Ôćĺ Q2` `done`
  - Multi-tenant DEK rotation `Q2 Ôćĺ Q3` `live`
  - Per-purpose codebook caching `Q3 Ôćĺ Q4` `at-risk`
- Operations & SRE
  - Manual key rotation `Q1 Ôćĺ Q2` `done`
  - Automated rotation pipeline `Q2 Ôćĺ Q3` `live`
  - Crypto-shred tooling `Q3 Ôćĺ Q4` `blocked`
- Compliance & Audit
  - Continuous audit trail `Q1 Ôćĺ Q3` `done`
  - Centralised examiner log `Q2 Ôćĺ Q4` `live`
  - Examiner evidence pack `Q3 Ôćĺ Q4`
- SDK & Integrations
  - Java and .NET parity `Q1 Ôćĺ Q2` `done`
  - Polyglot SDK parity `Q2 Ôćĺ Q4` `at-risk`
  - Edge runtime bindings `Q3 Ôćĺ Q4`
